text: Barney Frank, entering hospice care, embarks on a final act: Taking on the left - Politico
fullText: The former Massachusetts lawmaker says progressives in his party have “embraced an agenda that goes beyond what’s politically acceptable.”

text: State Department to release limited edition ‘America250’ passports with Trump’s face - Politico
fullText: The booklet will include an image of the president’s face on the inside cover and other founding-era imagery.

text: The United Arab Emirates is quitting OPEC oil cartel after nearly 60 years - NPR
fullText: The Arab oil producer has long expressed frustration with the quotas it has to follow as part of OPEC, the cartel of major state-owned oil producers.

text: FCC orders early license renewal for ABC stations following Kimmel's first lady joke - NPR
fullText: The Federal Communications Commission has ordered Disney's ABC to seek early broadcast license renewals for the eight TV stations it owns amid backlash over Jimmy Kimmel's joke about Melania Trump.

text: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI - The Verge
fullText: Elon Musk’s lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI is going to trial, and we’ll have all the latest updates about the maker of ChatGPT.

text: Chris Mannix’s NBA Notes: Disaster in Detroit, Joel Embiid Needs to Do Less - Sports Illustrated

text: First detailed ‘smell maps’ reveal how noses track odours - Nature
fullText: Detailed maps of smell receptors in the nose overturn textbook models of olfactory receptor organization in mice.

text: Agents armed with search warrants keep focus on Minnesota in public fraud probe - AP News

text: A Supreme Court justice’s personal ties to Haiti highlight stakes in asylum case - The Washington Post
fullText: The court is considering President Donald Trump’s effort to end temporary protected status for Haitians. Justice Amy Coney Barrett has two adopted children from Haiti.

text: Phillies Fire Rob Thomson, Name Don Mattingly Interim Manager - MLB Trade Rumors
fullText: The Phillies become the second underperforming playoff hopeful to fire their manager. MLB Trade Rumors has the latest out of Philadelphia.

text: Ukraine accuses Israel of importing grain ‘stolen’ by Russia as Zelenskyy warns of sanctions - AP News
fullText: Ukraine is accusing Israel of allowing the import of grain it claims Russia stole from occupied areas. President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says a vessel carrying grain arrived at an Israeli port, calling the trade illegal and warning of sanctions. Israel denies the…

text: South Korean court extends prison sentence for wife of ousted president - NPR
fullText: In January, Kim Keon Hee was sentenced to 20 months for accepting gifts from the Unification Church, which sought political favors.

text: Live Updates: King Charles meets with Trump at White House before address to Congress - CBS News
